---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for Dream Verge Studio
title: ''
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

## Summary
A clear and concise description of the feature you're requesting.

## Problem It Solves
What problem does this feature address? 
Ex: "As a psychologist, I find it difficult to..."

## Proposed Solution
Describe how you'd like this feature to work.

## Alternative Solutions
Have you considered any alternative approaches? If so, describe them.

## Clinical Use Case
How would this feature benefit professional dream analysis?
Ex: "This would help clinicians by..."

## Mockup / Example
If applicable, add sketches, screenshots, or examples of similar features in other tools.

## Priority
How important is this feature to your workflow?
- [ ] Nice to have
- [ ] Important
- [ ] Critical for my use case

## Additional Context
Any other context, links, or references about the feature request.
